name: Chicken Mole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil and remove.
2. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic until fragrant.
3. Add green chiles to the skillet.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, remaining ingredients (broth, spices, Tabasco).
5. Mix in peanut butter and baking chocolate until chocolate is melted.
6. Return chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Cook over low heat for 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot over cooked rice.
